title: Implement RPL routing in Python
description: Python implementation of RFC 6550 RPL. DIO/DIS/DAO/DAO-ACK messages. Trickle timer. MRHOF objective function with ETX. DODAG formation. Non-storing mode with source routing. Test with 5+ node topology.
notes: All listed deliverables DONE & tested in lichen.rpl (DIO/DIS/DAO/DAO-ACK, Trickle, MRHOF+ETX, DODAG formation, non-storing source routing, 5-node topology test). Not closed only because the epic-track dependency zev is still open (its remaining item is the IPv6<->SCHC extraction glue); close once that chain is reconciled.
close_reason: RPL in Python COMPLETE (lichen.rpl): DIO/DIS/DAO/DAO-ACK messages, RFC 6206 Trickle, MRHOF+ETX objective + DODAG formation/parent selection, non-storing source routing (RFC 6554 SRH), DAO route assembly with a 5-node line-topology test. All tested with independent oracles.
